canonical_answer: Two owl-shaped wooden cutouts stand side-by-side on a white surface. The owl on the left features a natural light wood finish with circular eyes. The owl on the right is painted gold with a scalloped feather pattern. A white fabric background displays a floral wreath design with green vines and purple flowers surrounding the figures.
